ops.body: Shipped as 53f32bcd65f9 (rebased onto yvzkmrpp's version-removal commit; clean merge, no conflicts). CI/Guides/cc-notes runs all green on the pushed commit. Workspace getaway-orch forgotten and removed. Codex review surfaced 12 findings, all addressed pre-ship (trusted-path shortlist, origin/sources filters, seats+avoidTransit re-check in expansion, quota min-fold, dedup fix, two Orchestration-invariant rewords).
